A more useful weapon than the [[Stun baton/Legends|stun baton]], the '''[[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] stun stick''' possessed high density energy cells making it unusable on the off-hand. They were considered good weapons for espionage missions and were very readily available on many worlds.

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
